rulings.Case Title: ALVA RANSFORD VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint By Old Orchard Industrial Corp., Individually And As Successor In Interest To Vapor Corporation
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT OLD ORCHARD INDUSTRIAL CORP.'S MOTION To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint By Old Orchard Industrial Corp., Individually And As Successor In Interest To Vapor Corporation, IS DENIED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. GRANTED, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS TO PRODUCTS ON LOCOMOTIVES BASED ON THE BOILER INSPECTION ACT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL L MITCHELL et al VS. AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT NIBCO INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRODUCE ANY EVIDENCE THAT THE VALVES PLAINTIFF WORKED ON CONTAINED ASBESTOS AND WAS ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT. OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL L MITCHELL et al VS. AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT CROWN EQUIPMENT CORP.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING REQUIRED. TURNER DECLARATION IS ADMISSIBLE, IN PART DUE TO SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF A REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. IS THE CONTINUANCE WARRANTED BASED ON THE DEFENDANT' RELIANCE ON THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION? =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL L MITCHELL et al VS. AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT NACCO MATERIALS HANDLING GROUP, INC.'S, AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO YALE MATERIALS HANDLING CORPORATION, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. LIBBY'S DECLARATION FAILS TO PROVIDE THE REQUISITE FOUNDATION FOR THE STATEMENTS MADE. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATION ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ABSENT THE LIBBY DECLARATION. LOSS OF CONSORTIUM CLAIM IS CONTROLLED BY BUTTRAM, MOTION DENIED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHANIE BERG et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 17. DEFENDANT LOUISIANA-PACIFIC CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. IT IS FAR FROM CLEAR THAT DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S ANSWER TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SIX AND TWENTY-ONE. ASSUMING DEFENDANT DID SO, PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON THE POWERS AND AY DECLARATIONS. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF THE ORIENT VS. CONSUMERINFO.COM, INC AKA EXPERIAN CONSUMER DIRECT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 29, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT CONSUMERINFO.COM, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DECISION IN PACIFIC STATE BANK V GREENE (2003) 110 CAL APP 4TH 375, 391-392 MAKES CLEAR THAT THE PENDERGRASS RULE APPLIES TO ACTIONS FOR RESCISSION. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, IN PARTICULAR PARAGRAPHS 8, 14-17 AND 20 MAKE CLEAR THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BASED UPON PROMISSORY FRAUD. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE FOR THE PROMISE IS CONTRARY TO THE SUBSEQUENT WRITTEN AGREEMENT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
